prompts.text: 'Palette' — artists use a palette to hold the colours they plan to use. Warm colours: red, orange, yellow. Cool colours: blue, green, purple. Name these families as colours are picked.
Before starting: 'Which three colours do you think you'll use most? Why those ones?' — encourages deliberate choice rather than random picking.
Affirm choices without directing: 'You chose [colour] for [part] — what made you pick that?' All choices are valid; the goal is intentional thinking about colour.
Core question: 'What colour is that in real life? Does it matter if we use a different one?' — opens up creative vs. realistic thinking.
